title: Argus Partners, Khaitan act on Cult.fit ₹440 crore Series G fundraise
description: Health and wellness platform Cult.fit (Curefit Healthcare Private Limited) has raised ~₹440 crore ($47 million) from a Series G fundraise, led by Temasek, through its investment arm, MacRitchie. Argus Partners advised Cult.fit on this fundraise.The transaction team consisted of Ashwin Krishnan (Partner) and Shivali Srivastava (Associate).Anindya Ghosh (Partner) provided strategic inputs on the transaction.Ashwin KrishnanKhaitan & Co advised Temasek on this fundraise.
